name: Ginger Chicken with Peaches ...Magazine
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat dry.
2. In a 10-inch skillet, cook the chicken in hot margarine over medium heat about 10 minutes or until tender enough to be easily pierced with a fork. Turn once.
3. Remove from the skillet and cover to keep warm.
4. Drain peaches, reserving syrup. Add water to reserved syrup to make 3/4 cup total.
5. Stir in the cornstarch and grated gingerroot.
6. Add to the skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly.
7. Add peaches and water chestnuts; heat through.
8. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
9. Spoon over chicken. Serve with rice.
